_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to tell the difference between people, things, actions, and places that are safe and those that are not safe.

_source.w: We are learning to tell the difference between people, things, actions, and places that are safe and those that are not safe.
y: Knowing what is safe helps us protect ourselves.
Identifying unsafe situations means we can ask for help.
Safety awareness is one of the most important skills we can learn.
eg: Pointing to a safe place versus an unsafe place in a picture.
Identifying that a hot stove is unsafe.
Naming trusted adults who keep us safe.
Recognising a dangerous situation in a story.
Saying 'that is not safe' when they see a hazard.
